design_rationale: The user requested a deep dark background with cyan/teal highlights and a professional data analysis tool appearance. The design maps to a modified Swiss/High-Contrast archetype built for dense dashboards. We avoid standard SaaS mud by using Deep Obsidian (#0A0A0A) as the base, pairing it with high-visibility Electric Cyan (#00E5FF). Typography leans heavily on IBM Plex Mono for data legibility, ensuring an authoritative, command-center aesthetic.

structure.control_panel: Sticky top navigation area with glassmorphism to remain accessible during scrolling.
structure.metrics_grid: 4-column CSS grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4) for top-level stats.
structure.charts_area: 2-column grid for side-by-side comparison, spanning full width on mobile.
structure.comparison_table: Full width container with overflow-x-auto for dense data tabular view.
structure.analysis_section: Reading-optimized max-w-3xl block at the bottom, left-aligned, spacious line-height.

surfaces.control_panel: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10 shadow-sm z-50
surfaces.card: bg-[#141414] border border-white/5 rounded-lg shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,229,255,0.02)] transition-all duration-300 hover:border-white/10 hover:shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,229,255,0.05)]
surfaces.metric_card: relative overflow-hidden bg-[#141414] border border-white/5 rounded-lg p-6

buttons.primary: bg-[#00E5FF] text-black font-semibold hover:bg-[#00BFA5] hover:text-black transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-2 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,229,255,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 hover:border-white/40 transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-2
buttons.danger: bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/30 text-red-500 hover:bg-red-500/20 transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-2

inputs.select: bg-[#0A0A0A] border-white/10 text-white focus:border-[#00E5FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00E5FF] rounded-md

charts.styling: Remove cartesian grid lines or make them extremely faint (stroke-white/5). Use smooth organic curves (type='monotone') for line charts. Use strokeWidth=2. Fill areas with linear gradients of the stroke color fading to transparent.

table.header: border-b border-white/10 text-left py-3 px-4 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-zinc-500 font-semibold

motion.data_updates: Use Framer Motion to softly pop (scale 1.05 -> 1) numeric values when they update in real-time.

icons.style: Duotone weight for high-end tech feel, mapping accent colors to the duotone layers.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against #141414 passes APCA guidelines. Cyan text (#00E5FF) is used only for large numbers or icons; for smaller text, use white or light grey.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts: Manrope, IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono from Google Fonts.
Install Recharts and configure Shadcn chart components with the specified dark theme colors.
Build the control panel as a sticky header using glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl).
Use standard semantic HTML sections, ensuring all inputs and interactive components are connected and testable via data-testid.
Ensure charts use responsive containers and adjust heights appropriately for mobile vs desktop views.
Render the Analysis Text using standard typography elements, avoiding cards for this section to create visual break.
